title: Ty Thac Co
description: ***.com.vn Ty Thac Co., Ltd., also known as Yih Shuo Footwear, is a prominent footwear manufacturing company based in Dong Thap Province, Vietnam.Established in 2011, the enterprise specializes in the large-scale production and global export of shoes and related components.Operating from its extensive facility in Thap Muoi District, the company plays a significant role in the local industrial sector by managing complex international supply chains
